topic: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses)

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I had been eating rice for an hour.

exercises.audioScript: I will have been eating rice for an hour.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा होऊँगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She has been working for two hours.
I will have been eating rice for an hour.
exercises.answer: I will have been eating rice for an hour.

options: I have been eating rice for an hour.

exercises.audioScript: She has been working for two hours.
exercises.hindiScript: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She had been working for two hours.
She has been working for two hours.
exercises.answer: She has been working for two hours.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

dictationPassage.text: I will have eaten rice. I will have been eating rice for an hour. She works. She is working. She has worked.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: मैं चावल खा चुका होऊँगा। मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा होऊँगा। वह काम करती है। वह काम कर रही है। उसने काम कर लिया है।
